name: agentgeo
description: GEO skills for coding agents: fetch what AI engines actually answer about a brand, then compute visibility, share-of-voice, citations and sentiment locally.

plugins.name: agentgeo
plugins.description: The eight geo-* Agent Skills plus the agentgeo-mcp stdio server (auto-started via npx; set AGENTGEO_API_KEY — an ag_test_... key runs everything in zero-credit demo mode).
